title: firewall_rule
description: One inbound or outbound firewall rule — one record per rule within an AWS security group, GCP firewall rule, or Azure NSG rule. Port-range checks and unrestricted-source checks are the primary policy targets. Identity key: group_id + direction + index.

name.description: Human-readable name including parent group name.

provider.description: Cloud provider short name: aws, gcp, azure.

group_id.description: Parent security group or firewall rule set ID.

from_port.description: Start of port range. -1 means all ports.

to_port.description: End of port range. -1 means all ports.
